name: Apify MCP Server (Official)
what_it_does: Official Apify MCP server enabling AI agents to run Apify Actors — a marketplace of 2,000+ pre-built web scraping and automation tools for Google Search, Amazon, social media, and many other platforms.
use_cases: Running Apify Actors for web scraping tasks from agent workflows
Extracting structured data from Google Search, LinkedIn, Amazon via actors
Social media data extraction (Twitter, Instagram, TikTok scrapers)
Running custom Apify Actors for specialized data extraction
Web crawling at scale using Apify's cloud infrastructure
not_for: Simple website scraping — use Firecrawl or Browserbase for that
Teams not needing the breadth of Apify's Actor marketplace
best_when: An agent needs structured data from specific platforms (Google, LinkedIn, Amazon, social media) and Apify has a pre-built Actor for that source.
avoid_when: You only need to scrape a single website — simpler tools (Firecrawl, Browserbase) are more cost-effective.

auth.notes: Single Apify API token via APIFY_TOKEN. No scope granularity — token grants full account access including billing.

pricing.notes: Actor marketplace has varying per-use pricing on top of platform credits. Credit-based system can make cost unpredictable for agents.

performance.rate_limits: Actor concurrency limits by plan; API rate limits per token

known_agent_gotchas: Actor runs are async — agents must poll for completion or set up webhooks
Different actors have different input schemas — agents must know the actor's inputs
Platform credits + actor-specific costs can make budgeting complex
Some actors are community-maintained — quality varies significantly
Anti-bot detection affects even well-maintained actors — results not guaranteed
Actor outputs vary in format — inspect schema before processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token has no scope granularity — full account access. Web data passes through Apify infrastructure. SOC 2 Type II, GDPR.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API token lacks scopes — full account access. Data passes through Apify. SOC 2, GDPR.
